# Version 3.119.4
> **GTK4 support and platform hardening** · Released May 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.4) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)
> **Supersedes [3.119.3](3.119.3.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.4/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.4 adds a new GTK4 view, Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, and rolls the 3.119.3 preview work. It also lands NativeAOT fixes, delay-loads D3D12 to survive on hosts without DirectX 12, refactors SKManagedStream around an SKData snapshot, refreshes libpng and libwebp, and enforces `-Wl,--no-undefined` on Linux and Android natives so regressions surface at link time.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Bumps libpng to 1.6.54 then 1.6.58, libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and removes unused externals so the shipping surface stays lean. ([#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3463](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3463), [#3723](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3723))

## API Surface

- **SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4** — New GTK4 view built on the GirCore Gtk-4.0 bindings, giving GTK4 apps a first-party `SKDrawingArea`. ([#3527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3527))
- **SKManagedStream reworked around an SKData snapshot** — Replaces the parent/child stream chain with an `SKData` snapshot so managed streams cannot outlive their parent — clearer lifetime semantics and no more chained-stream footguns. ([#3589](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3589))

## Bug Fixes

- **NativeAOT crash with `IlcDisableReflection=true` fixed** — Fixes a crash when SkiaSharp is consumed from a NativeAOT app that has reflection disabled via `IlcDisableReflection=true`. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash fixed** — Adds the fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 builds locate fontconfig at runtime and no longer crash on first text draw. ([#3494](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3494))
- **SKGLView redraws after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android** — Restores rendering when an `SKGLView` is hosted inside a MAUI TabBar and the tab is switched away and back. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **GTK4 SKDrawingArea Cairo assertion crash fixed** — Fixes a Cairo assertion that would crash the GTK4 `SKDrawingArea` on first draw. ([#3562](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3562))
- **D3D12 DLLs are delay-loaded** — Delay-loads the D3D12 DLLs so SkiaSharp keeps working on Windows hosts that do not have DirectX 12 installed instead of failing to load. ([#3633](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3633))
- **WindowsForms controls use `DesignMode` directly** — Uses the `DesignMode` property directly in WindowsForms controls to fix rendering inside the Visual Studio designer. ([#3614](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3614))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic (Android-native) assets** — Publishes Linux Bionic native assets so SkiaSharp can be consumed from Android-native (bionic) runtimes, not just the managed Android target. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds** — Adds x64 and arm64 architectures to the Tizen native build matrix and updates the Tizen support to Studio 6.1 with corrected TFMs and a 3-tab sample. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619))
- **tvOS native builds split per architecture** — Splits the tvOS device and simulator native builds into separate frameworks (matching the iOS pattern) so the `NativeReference` targets pick the right binary for each architecture. ([#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561), [#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563))
- **.NET 10 SDK band with pinned workload versions** — Moves the build to the .NET 10 SDK with pinned workload versions, and updates `rollForward` from `latestPatch` to `latestFeature` so servicing keeps flowing. ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514), [#3624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3624))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **PolySharp brings C# 13 to legacy TFMs** — Adopts PolySharp so the binding project can use C# 13 language features across every target framework, including net48. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3642](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3642))
- **net48 full-framework target for Windows validation** — Adds a net48 target and uses it to validate that SkiaSharp still consumes cleanly from full-framework .NET on Windows. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3631](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3631))
- **-Wl,--no-undefined enforced on Linux and Android** — Enforces the `-Wl,--no-undefined` linker flag so any unresolved native symbol surfaces at link time instead of at first call in production. ([#3629](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3629))

## Security

- **Spectre mitigation on libSkiaSharp for Linux and Windows** — Enables the Spectre mitigation compiler flag for `libSkiaSharp.dll` on Windows and `libSkiaSharp.so` on Linux to reduce the impact of speculative-execution side-channel attacks. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502))

## Preview 1 (April 22, 2026)

Preview 1 rolled up the entire 3.119.3 preview line — libpng, libwebp and brotli refreshes, the NativeAOT and Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash fixes, Spectre mitigation on Windows and Linux — and then added the new GTK4 view, Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, the `SKManagedStream` `SKData` snapshot rework, tvOS device/simulator split, delay-loaded D3D12, the MAUI TabBar `SKGLView` fix and the .NET 10 SDK move.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.3-preview.1.1...v3.119.4-preview.1.1)

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

Preview 1 rolled up the entire 3.119.3 preview line — libpng, libwebp and brotli refreshes, the NativeAOT and Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash fixes, Spectre mitigation on Windows and Linux — and then added the new GTK4 view, Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, the `SKManagedStream` `SKData` snapshot rework, tvOS device/simulator split, delay-loaded D3D12, the MAUI TabBar `SKGLView` fix and the .NET 10 SDK move.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
